title: Meta submits reply on Instagram CSAM ads, government reviewing response: IT secretary
snippet: IT Secretary S. Krishnan confirmed that MeitY is reviewing Meta's response to its notice regarding CSAM ads on Instagram.&nbsp;

title: Anthropic rolls out rupee pricing for Claude AI in India

title: Crypto exchanges cash in on SpaceX frenzy with pre-IPO derivatives
snippet: Billions of dollars have flowed into ​instruments dubbed "pre-IPO perpetual futures", which have no direct link to the underlying shares but are priced with reference to ​SpaceX's latest disclosed pre-IPO valuation.
